<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Koselugo as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of symptomatic, inoperable plexiform neurofibromas (PN) in paediatric patients with neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) aged 3 years and above</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>familial generalized lentiginosis（100.0%）</li>
<li>gastrocutaneous syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>rhabdoid tumor（100.0%）</li>
<li>congenital multiple café-au-lait macules-increased sister chromatid exchange syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>acromelanosis（100.0%）</li>
<li>Moynahan syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>leukonychia totalis-acanthosis-nigricans-like lesions-abnormal hair syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>osteopathia striata-pigmentary dermopathy-white forelock syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>peripheral nerve schwannoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>trigeminal schwannoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>microcystic/reticular schwannoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>schwannoma of twelfth cranial nerve（99.9%）</li>
<li>sympathetic neurilemmoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>bilateral parasagittal parieto-occipital polymicrogyria（99.9%）</li>
<li>trichomegaly-retina pigmentary degeneration-dwarfism syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>axial spondylometaphyseal dysplasia（99.9%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（99.9%）</li>
<li>lower motor neuron syndrome with late-adult onset（99.9%）</li>
<li>lethal arthrogryposis-anterior horn cell disease syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>neurofibromatosis（99.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
